Faulkner, a Partner at New Enterprise Associates (NEA), has worked closely with Factory since joining the Company’s board in conjunction with NEA leading its $50 million Series B. title: VNET Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
description: On the operational side, our wholesale IDC business delivered robust growth driven by strong customer demand and fast customer movements as of March 31, 2026. title: SpaceX IPO targets retail investors as hype builds around record-breaking debut
description: After several sluggish years for the IPO market, SpaceX is preparing to make its public market debut in what could become the largest stock offering in history. The company plans to begin trading on the Nasdaq on June 12 under the ticker symbol SPCX following the filing of its S-1 registration statement.
